title: Groov-e Power Bank 5000mAh Portable Magnetic Wireless Charger - Silver - Fast Charging, Recharges Smartphones Up to 2 Full Times, USB-C Input and Output, Compatible with MagSafe

amazon_product_details_section.Delivery information: : We cannot deliver certain products outside mainland UK ( Details). We will only be able to confirm if this product can be delivered to your chosen address when you enter your delivery address at checkout.

features: 5000mAh CAPACITY: Equipped with a 5000mAh battery, this power bank stores enough energy to recharge most smartphones up to two full times, giving you dependable backup power for travel, emergencies, and everyday use
FAST CHARGE: Delivers high-speed charging so you spend less time tethered to a cable; quickly powers up your devices; ideal when you’re on the go and need a boost in minutes instead of hours
WIRELESS CHARGING: Charge your phone by simply placing it on the pad – no cables required; suitable for desks, nightstands, and travel; offers convenient and no-clutter power whenever you need it

USB-C INPUT & OUTPUT: With modern USB-C ports for both input and output, you get faster charging and broader compatibility; easily recharge the power bank and power up your devices with a single, universal cable

COMPATIBLE WITH MAGSAFE: Designed to work with MagSafe-enabled phones, this power bank snaps into place magnetically for a secure fit and efficient charging; ideal for hands-free use while texting, calling, or browsing
description: Never worry about running out of battery again with the groov-e Magnetic Power Bank. Engineered for convenience and reliability, this innovative power bank features magnetic wireless charging technology, ensuring effortless charging wherever you are.
